scenarios.label: Upside · Spain click

scenarios.label: Downside · England frustrates
scenarios.note: A flat, low-margin night — England sit in and the tie tightens, live to swing on extra time or penalties.

Spain: Blunter in the final third — fewer clear chances created.
England: No glaring weakness — a balanced side on current form.

risk_factors: Margins are razor-thin — a single moment likely settles it.
Model confidence is modest (29/100) — wide outcome spread.

reasons: Mikel Oyarzabal (FW) is fit and firing — in 7.8/10 form, 4 goals in his last 5, at 100% fitness.
The ensemble (Elo + Dixon-Coles + XGBoost + market) makes Spain a 46% favourite to win.
A decisive result is likely (draw only 25%), favouring the stronger side.
explainability.why_penalties: A shootout is unlikely (14%) — one side should settle it inside 120'.
explainability.what_could_change: An early goal swings momentum; an injury to Spain's key creator, or England stealing a set-piece, flips it.
